message.content:
@startuml
skinparam ClassBoxStyle fillcolor:#f0f0f0
skinparam ActorStyle fillcolor:#c8e6c9
skinparam InterfaceStyle fillcolor:#f5f5f5
skinparam RelationshipStyle linecolor:#000000
skinparam RelationshipLabelStyle fillcolor:#ffffff

class App {
    "main()"
    "start()"
}

class FileHandler {
    promptFile(): String
    writeListToFile(): void
    readListFromFile(): ArrayList<String>
}

class item {
    LocalDate dueDate
    String desc
    getDesc()
    getDate()
    setDesc()
    setDate()
}

class HomeScreenController {
    ObservableList<OL> Lists
    viewListsClicked()
    listClicked(nameOfList, mode)
    addBlankListClicked()
    addExistingListClicked()
    editListClicked()
    saveAllListsClicked()
    confirmDeleteClicked()
}

class ListScreenController {
    ObservableList currentList
    filterBoxChanged()
    saveToStorage()
    addNewItemClicked()
    deleteSelectedClicked()
    completeBoxChanged(item)
    itemDescChanged(item)
    itemDueDateChanged(item)
    itemSelected(item)
}

App --> HomeScreenController
HomeScreenController --> ListScreenController
HomeScreenController --> FileHandler
ListScreenController --> FileHandler
ListScreenController --> item
FileHandler --> item
item --> ListScreenController
@enduml
